name: Three-Cheese Grits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Enriched Hominy Quick Grits (Quaker or Aunt Jemima)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan over high heat.
4. Slowly stir in grits and salt (if using). Return mixture to boil, then reduce heat.
5. Simmer on low for 2 to 3 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in cheeses, margarine, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and beaten egg.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
NOTE: To substitute regular Quaker or Aunt Jemima Enriched Hominy Grits, increase water to 2-1/2 cups and simmer time to 12 to 14 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally. Follow with the same steps.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Heat water in a microwave-safe dish for 4 to 6 minutes on high until boiling.
2. Stir in grits and salt (if using). Microwave on high for 3 to 4 minutes until thickened, stirring once.
3. Add cheeses, margarine, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and beaten egg; stir until melted and combined.
4. Microwave on high for 8 to 10 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, rotating the dish every 3 minutes.
